item.title: Run Claude Code using Ollama
item.description: "This tutorial shows how to run claude code using a local Ollama model."
item.author: ben-hur
item.content:encoded:
Install Ollama:

curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh

Pull a model

ollama pull llama3.2

Configure the ollama select model for claude

ollama launch claude --model llama3.2

Set the env vars to connect Claude to Ollama:

export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="ollama"
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=""
export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="http://localhost:11434"

Run claude

claude --model llama3.2
